assertions.title: HR and payroll docs explain lifecycle and posting/payment boundaries

steps.expected: docs/modules/hr.md covers employee CRUD, types (STAFF/LABOUR), payment schedules (MONTHLY/WEEKLY)
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md documents Employee CRUD (creation, update, deletion, retrieval), employee types STAFF (monthly salary) and LABOUR (daily wage), payment schedules MONTHLY (staff) and WEEKLY (labour). Cross-check with Employee.java confirms enum EmployeeType { STAFF, LABOUR } and enum PaymentSchedule { MONTHLY, WEEKLY } match exactly.

steps.expected: Leave types, balances, request workflow (PENDING → APPROVED/REJECTED) documented
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md documents leave type policies (configurable categories with entitlement rules), leave balances (per-employee tracking per year), leave requests (submission, approval workflow, status updates), and status transitions PENDING → APPROVED/REJECTED. Cross-check with LeaveService.java confirms LeaveStatus enum { PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED } and the approval/rejection workflow with balance delta application.

steps.expected: Daily attendance, bulk operations, attendance summary documented
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md documents daily attendance marking (single and bulk), attendance import from external systems, attendance summary (daily and monthly), and payroll linkage. Cross-check with HrController.java confirms endpoints: GET /attendance/date/{date}, GET /attendance/summary, POST /attendance/bulk-mark, POST /attendance/bulk-import, GET /attendance/summary/monthly.

steps.expected: DRAFT → CALCULATED → APPROVED → POSTED → PAID → CANCELLED status progression documented
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md includes a full lifecycle table with all six statuses: DRAFT, CALCULATED, APPROVED, POSTED, PAID, CANCELLED, with descriptions and next-status transitions. Cross-check with PayrollRun.java confirms enum PayrollStatus { DRAFT, CALCULATED, APPROVED, POSTED, PAID, CANCELLED } matches exactly.

steps.expected: Earnings, deductions (PF, ESI, TDS, Professional Tax), statutory engine documented
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md documents earnings (gross pay based on salary/wage and attendance), deductions including PF, ESI, TDS, Professional Tax, loan/advance recovery, other deductions, and net pay calculation. References StatutoryDeductionEngine. Cross-check with StatutoryDeductionEngine.java confirms methods calculatePfDeduction(), calculateEsiDeduction(), calculateTdsDeduction(), calculateProfessionalTaxDeduction() all present with Indian rules.

PASS — hr.md includes explicit 'HR → Accounting (Payroll Posting Seam)' section documenting PayrollPostingService.postPayrollToAccounting() → AccountingFacade.postPayrollRun() call chain, host mapping (/api/v1/payroll/runs/{id}/post → /api/v1/accounting/journals), and journal entry creation. Cross-check with PayrollPostingService.java confirms accountingFacade.postPayrollRun() is the canonical seam.

steps.expected: Docs explain two-phase payment process (accounting-host payment, then mark-as-paid)
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md documents the two-phase payment process: (1) payment journal created at /api/v1/accounting/payroll/payments/batch, (2) HR module marks payroll as PAID via PayrollPostingService.markAsPaid(). Cross-check with PayrollPostingService.java confirms markAsPaid() requires paymentJournalEntryId, validates status is POSTED or PAID, and links canonical payment reference.

steps.expected: Docs list required accounts: SALARY-EXP, WAGE-EXP, SALARY-PAYABLE, etc.
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md includes a full 'Required Accounts for Payroll Posting' table with 8 accounts: SALARY-EXP (EXPENSE), WAGE-EXP (EXPENSE), SALARY-PAYABLE (LIABILITY), EMP-ADV (ASSET), PF-PAYABLE (LIABILITY), ESI-PAYABLE (LIABILITY), TDS-PAYABLE (LIABILITY), PROFESSIONAL-TAX-PAYABLE (LIABILITY). Cross-check with PayrollPostingService.java REQUIRED_PAYROLL_ACCOUNT_TYPES map confirms exact match: all 8 account codes with correct AccountType values.

steps.expected: Tenant isolation, module gating (HR_PAYROLL optional), CompanyContextService scoping
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md documents tenant isolation (CompanyContextService.requireCurrentCompany()), no cross-tenant access (company_id filtering), module gating (HR_PAYROLL optional module, MODULE_DISABLED error when disabled, paused by default for new tenants per ERP-33). Cross-check with hr/AGENTS.md confirms ModuleGatingService and HR_PAYROLL module gating.

steps.expected: Period+type idempotency, idempotency key support, posting idempotency rules
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md documents: (a) payroll run idempotency — period+type uniqueness, duplicate detection returns existing run; (b) idempotency key support — Idempotency-Key header on /api/v1/payroll/** endpoints; (c) payroll calculation idempotency — recalculation updates lines; (d) payroll posting idempotency — re-posting validates existing journal link, status POSTED without journal link fails with BUSINESS_INVALID_STATE, journal mismatch fails with CONCURRENCY_CONFLICT; (e) payroll payment idempotency — mark-as-paid idempotent within POSTED or PAID. Cross-check with PayrollRunService.java confirms buildIdempotencyKey() uses PAYROLL:{type}:{start}:{end} pattern, and PayrollPostingService.java confirms all documented posting invariants.

steps.expected: Legacy HR endpoints returning 410 GONE documented with canonical replacement
steps.observed: PASS — hr.md documents legacy HR endpoints: GET /api/v1/hr/payroll-runs → 410 GONE, POST /api/v1/hr/payroll-runs → 410 GONE, with canonical redirect to /api/v1/payroll/runs. Cross-check with HrController.java confirms legacyPayrollRunsGone() returns HttpStatus.GONE with ApiResponse.failure() and canonicalPath guidance.

PASS — docs/INDEX.md line 39 contains: | [hr](modules/hr.md) | Employees, leave, attendance, payroll runs, and payroll posting/payment |. The hr module is listed in the Modules table with accurate description.

steps.expected: docs/modules/hr.md has valid 'Last reviewed: YYYY-MM-DD' marker
steps.observed: PASS — docs/modules/hr.md line 3 contains 'Last reviewed: 2026-03-30', which is a valid YYYY-MM-DD date matching today's date.

sourceCodeCrossChecks.LeaveService.java: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/hr/service/LeaveService.java — confirmed LeaveStatus {PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED}, balance tracking, approval workflow
sourceCodeCrossChecks.HrController.java: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/hr/controller/HrController.java — confirmed attendance endpoints, legacy payroll-runs 410 GONE
sourceCodeCrossChecks.PayrollRun.java: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/hr/domain/PayrollRun.java — confirmed PayrollStatus {DRAFT, CALCULATED, APPROVED, POSTED, PAID, CANCELLED}
sourceCodeCrossChecks.StatutoryDeductionEngine.java: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/hr/service/StatutoryDeductionEngine.java — confirmed PF, ESI, TDS, Professional Tax calculation methods
sourceCodeCrossChecks.PayrollPostingService.java: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/hr/service/PayrollPostingService.java — confirmed REQUIRED_PAYROLL_ACCOUNT_TYPES (8 entries), AccountingFacade seam, markAsPaid() two-phase, posting idempotency
sourceCodeCrossChecks.PayrollRunService.java: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/hr/service/PayrollRunService.java — confirmed period+type idempotency key pattern, signature validation

evidence.indexLink: docs/INDEX.md line 39 — [hr](modules/hr.md) linked from Modules table

summary: Tested VAL-FIN-003 with 13 specific checks covering all required aspects. All 13 checks PASS. The HR/payroll docs packet at docs/modules/hr.md comprehensively documents employee management, leave management, attendance tracking, payroll run lifecycle, payroll calculation, posting/payment boundaries, required accounts, multi-tenant boundaries, idempotency/replay expectations, and deprecated paths. All claims are code-grounded and match source code enums, service methods, controller endpoints, and constants. The packet is discoverable from docs/INDEX.md and carries a valid freshness marker.
